docket_entries.description: ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT HOGAN, JOSEPH
STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT, SIGNED BY ALL PARTIES, FILED BY PLAINTIFF KIRCHER, VINCENT HOGAN, JOSEPH

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HOGAN, JOSEPH THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 402 BROADWAY ST. #20, S.F., STAYED UNTIL NOV-04-1997, LEASE FORFEITED, NO FURTHER STAYS. MUTUAL WAIVER OF CLAIMS, INCLUDING 1542CC. DEFT IS SOLE OCCUPANT. PERSONAL PROPERTY LEFT DEEMED ABANDONED.

MEMO TO SET FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF KIRCHER, VINCENT SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR OCT-16-1997 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 01 SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON OCT-22-1997 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED

DEMAND FOR JURY FILED BY DEFENDANT HOGAN, JOSEPH

JUDGE PRO TEM:JONATHAN STEINER/CLERK:ECLAVERIA/RPTR:(WAIVED) CASE ON FOR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE. PLFF APPEARED THRU COUNSEL AND DEFT PRESENT, IN PROPER. CASE SETTLED AND STIPULATION SIGNED BEFORE PRO TEM JUDGE. STIPULATION NOT ON RECORD -REPORTER WAIVED.
